title: Title Slide
purpose: Campaign Name & Year cover page.

title: Agenda
purpose: Table of Contents for the report.

title: Section Header: LINE Performance
purpose: Declares the start of the LINE Performance section and notes the report month.

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP LINE FRIEND
purpose: Divider for Line Friend metrics.

title: Line Friends Growth
purpose: Time-series graph showing total friends added, organic growth, and block rates over time.

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP TRAFFIC SOURCE
purpose: Divider for Traffic Source metrics.

title: Traffic Sources
purpose: Time-series graph showing where new friends came from (e.g., LINE Lap, Organic) and totals.

title: Registers vs. Points Collected
purpose: Bar chart comparing the trend of new registered users against points collected across months.

title: Redeem (By Items)
purpose: Chart showing the total number of physical reward items redeemed by users.

title: Redeem (By Points)
purpose: Bar graph showing the total amount of points spent/burned on redemptions.

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP LINE POINTS
purpose: Divider for Points Economy metrics.

title: Points Accumulation
purpose: Breakdown of actual points collected vs. points accumulated from previous campaigns.

title: Points Analysis & Recommendations
purpose: Text-heavy slide summarizing point balances and strategic recommendations.

title: Loyalty Program User Types
purpose: Breakdown of the loyalty program users by category (e.g., specific store types).

title: Point Holding Ranges
purpose: Shows the distribution of users based on how many points they hold (e.g., Range 1-50 pts vs 1-200 pts).

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP FAN DEMO
purpose: Divider for Demographics metrics.

title: Demographics (New Users)
purpose: Age and gender breakdown specifically for new users in the report month.

title: Demographics (All Users)
purpose: Age and gender breakdown for the entire loyalty user base.

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP RICH MENU ENGAGEMENT
purpose: Divider for Rich Menu metrics.

title: Rich Menu Clicks
purpose: Tracks engagement and clicks on the LINE Official Account's bottom menu.

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP FAQ
purpose: Divider for Survey/FAQ metrics.

title: Customer Identity
purpose: Survey results identifying the types of businesses using Tulip.

title: Buying Habits
purpose: Survey results on purchase frequency (e.g., 'More than 1 time per week').

title: Buying Frequency (Quantity)
purpose: Survey results on how many pouches they buy per purchase.

title: Brand Alternatives
purpose: Survey results on what competitor brands they use.

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP CONTENTS
purpose: Divider for Content performance.

title: Content Performance
purpose: Tracks delivery, open rates, and performance of specific broadcast posts/messages.

title: Sub-section Header: TULIP SUMMARY
purpose: Divider for Summary section.

title: Executive Summary
purpose: The final slide providing a high-level summary of the month's performance and strategic recommendations.

title: Thank You
purpose: Thank you slide.
